service_list.name: Roofing
service_list.brief: Hytek Roofing offers roofing services for Brisbane homes, including roof repairs and leak-related roofing work.

service_list.name: Guttering
service_list.brief: Hytek Roofing offers guttering solutions, including gutter repairs for Brisbane homes.

service_list.name: Gutter Guards
service_list.brief: Hytek Roofing offers gutter guard services as part of its roofing and guttering solutions.

service_list.name: Downpipes
service_list.brief: Hytek Roofing offers downpipe services, including work connected to stormwater drainage and roof leak prevention.

key_messaging: Roof Repairs, Guttering & Leak Fixes Done Right - No Runaround
Fast response, clear pricing, and work that actually lasts

improved_hero_copy.h1: Brisbane Roof Repairs Without the Runaround
improved_hero_copy.subhead: Licensed roof plumbing for leaks, gutters, downpipes and stormwater issues, with clear pricing and a 48-hour quote turnaround.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Roof Leaks, Gutters & Downpipes Fixed Properly
improved_hero_copy.subhead: Hytek Roofing helps Brisbane homeowners get durable repairs from a fully licensed and insured team backed by a workmanship guarantee.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Fast, Reliable Roof Plumbing in Brisbane
improved_hero_copy.subhead: From gutter repairs to leak prevention, get straightforward advice, clean work and roofing solutions built to last.

improved_service_descriptions.description: Repair roof issues before they become costly internal damage, with licensed Brisbane roof plumbing focused on durable, tidy workmanship.
Fix leaking, damaged or poorly performing gutters so rainwater moves away from your home properly.
Reduce gutter blockages and ongoing maintenance with gutter guard solutions suited to Brisbane homes.
Improve water flow from roof to stormwater with downpipe repairs and upgrades that help prevent overflow and leaks.

meta_descriptions.description: Need roof repairs, guttering, downpipes or leak prevention in Brisbane? Hytek Roofing is fully licensed and insured with 80+ 5-star reviews.
Learn about Hytek Roofing, a Brisbane roof plumbing team providing clean, professional roofing and guttering solutions for local homes.

brief.redesign_brief: Keep Hytek Roofing’s strongest proof points: licensed Brisbane roof plumber, 80+ combined 5-star reviews, 48-hour quote turnaround, fully licensed and insured status, workmanship guarantee, and the direct no-runaround positioning. Improve the site by reducing duplicated sections, making service pages and CTAs clearer, surfacing phone and quote actions more consistently, strengthening local Brisbane SEO, and using the gallery as proof of real roofing work. The redesign matters because roof repair customers are often urgent and risk-aware, so the site needs to build trust quickly, explain services plainly, and make contacting Hytek Roofing feel immediate and low-friction.
